name: JDM JingDaMachine(Ningbo)Co.Ltd
summary: JDM JingDaMachine(Ningbo)Co.Ltd manufactures and sells equipment for the heat exchange industry in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers heat exchanger equipment, such as fin press lines; vertical, horizontal, portable, and mobile expander machines; CNC micro-shrinkage vertical tube; semi-auto and automatic hairpin, return, and CNC vertical coil benders; CNC three-dimensional pipe bender; and high speed servo long U pipe, insulating pipe cutting, return bender, coil straightening cutter, U bend and automatic cleaning, ring sizing and loading, drying and welding, and vacuum tank leak detection machines. It also provides press equipment, including single-point precision; closed four-point connecting rod; closed four-, double-, and single-point precision punch; transfer, high speed precision, and progressive die/blanking press; closed single and double crankshaft; motor stator and rotor; spindle rotor punch; and open double and single crankshaft servo, as well as automobile sheet metal. In addition, the company offers micro channel equipment comprising pipe making, core assembly, and fin machines; fin core installation units; and swing fin punch, as well as powder metallurgy equipment. Further, it provides composite press equipment. The company was formerly known as Ningdo JingDa Electromechanical Technology Co,Ltd. and changed its name to JDM JingDaMachine(Ningbo)Co.Ltd in 2011. JDM JingDaMachine(Ningbo)Co.Ltd was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Ningbo, the People's Republic of China.
